parameters.message: =New Outdoor Squad lead: {{ $json.body.lead.name || "website enquiry" }} ({{ $json.body.lead.phone || "no phone" }}) — {{ $json.body.lead.route || "enquiry" }}. Check email for the full summary.

meta.description: Receives Robo-Nick lead summaries and notifies Nick by email + SMS. Incoming POST body: { event, destination_phone, summary_text, lead: { name, email, phone, route, location_preference, time_preference, concerns, handoff_summary, session_id, timestamp } }. Field paths use {{ $json.body.* }}. Before going live: (1) set SMTP credentials on 'Email Nick' and a real fromEmail; (2) set Twilio credentials + your Twilio number on 'SMS Nick'; (3) Activate the workflow and copy the Production webhook URL into the bot's OUTDOOR_SQUAD_LEAD_SUMMARY_WEBHOOK_URL; (4) optional: add Header Auth to the webhook and set OUTDOOR_SQUAD_LEAD_SUMMARY_WEBHOOK_SECRET to match the X-Outdoor-Squad-Secret header.
